CustomField.formula: IF(AND(Flosum__Review_Result__c = 0, ISPICKVAL(Flosum__State__c, 'COMPLETED')),IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'icons/Competed.png', 'No issues', 22, 127),IF(ISPICKVAL(Flosum__State__c, 'CANCELED') ,IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'icons/ErrorY.png', 'Error', 22, 127),IF(AND(Flosum__Review_Result__c > 0, ISPICKVAL(Flosum__State__c, 'COMPLETED')),IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'icons/IssuesY.png', 'Issues found', 22, 127),IF(OR (ISPICKVAL(Flosum__State__c, 'WAIT REVIEW'), ISPICKVAL(Flosum__State__c, 'IN PROGRESS')) ,IMAGE('/resource/'+$Setup.Flosum__Credentials__c.Flosum__Namespace__c+'icons/InProgress.png', 'In progress', 22, 127),''))))
CustomField.label: Result
